View Javadoc
1   package com.hack23.cia.service.external.riksdagen.impl;
2   
3   import javax.xml.bind.ValidationEvent;
4   import javax.xml.bind.ValidationEventHandler;
5   
6   import org.slf4j.Logger;
7   import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
8   
9   /**
10   * Lenient validation event handler for XML parsing.
11   * Logs validation errors but allows parsing to continue for non-fatal issues.
12   * This is useful when dealing with external APIs that may have minor schema variations.
13   */
14  public final class LenientValidationEventHandler implements ValidationEventHandler {
15      
16      private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(LenientValidationEventHandler.class);
17      
18      @Override
19      public boolean handleEvent(final ValidationEvent event) {
20          if (event == null) {
21              return true;
22          }
23          
24          final int severity = event.getSeverity();
25          
26          switch (severity) {
27              case ValidationEvent.WARNING:
28                  LOGGER.debug("XML validation warning: {}", event.getMessage());
29                  return true; // Continue parsing
30                  
31              case ValidationEvent.ERROR:
32                  LOGGER.warn("XML validation error at line {}, column {}: {}",
33                      event.getLocator() != null ? event.getLocator().getLineNumber() : "unknown",
34                      event.getLocator() != null ? event.getLocator().getColumnNumber() : "unknown",
35                      event.getMessage());
36                  return true; // Continue parsing despite error
37                  
38              case ValidationEvent.FATAL_ERROR:
39                  LOGGER.error("Fatal XML validation error: {}", event.getMessage(), event.getLinkedException());
40                  return false; // Stop parsing
41                  
42              default:
43                  LOGGER.info("Unknown validation event severity {}: {}", severity, event.getMessage());
44                  return true;
45          }
46      }
47  }
© 2008–2026 www.hack23.com
